interval.description: Specify Query Interval, unit: second, default is 1

port.description: Specify local port to send probe packet, default is 0 (no port)

sleep.description: Specify Sleep Time when query fail, unit: second, default is 3

timeout.description: Specify Query Timeout, unit: msec, default is 3000

track.description: Specify Tracking Time, unit: second, default is 60

total-query.description: Total number of DNS queries received

total-response.description: Total number of DNS replies sent to clients

bad-packet-query.description: Number of queries with incorrect data length

bad-packet-response.description: Number of replies with incorrect data length

bad-header-query.description: Number of queries with incorrect header

bad-header-response.description: Number of replies with incorrect header

bad-format-query.description: Number of queries with incorrect format

bad-format-response.description: Number of replies with incorrect format

bad-service-query.description: Number of queries with unknown service

bad-service-response.description: Number of replies with unknown service

bad-class-query.description: Number of queries with incorrect class

bad-class-response.description: Number of replies with incorrect class

bad-type-query.description: Number of queries with incorrect type

bad-type-response.description: Number of replies with incorrect type

no_answer.description: Number of replies with unknown server IP

action.description: 'none': No action (default); 'drop': Drop query; 'reject': Send refuse response; 'ignore': Send empty response;

logging.description: 'none': No logging (default); 'query': DNS Query; 'response': DNS Response; 'both': Both DNS Query and Response;

learn.description: Learn neighbour information from other controllers

standalone.description: Run GSLB Group in standalone mode

keep-tracking.description: Keep tracking client even round-delay-time samples are ready

ignore-id.description: Ignore IP Address specified in IP List by ID

samples.description: Specify samples number for round-delay-time (Number of samples,default is 5)

tolerance.description: The difference percentage between the round-delay-time, default is 10 (Tolerance)

difference.description: The difference between the round-delay-time, default is 0

ttl.description: Specify Auto Map TTL (TTL, default is 300)

limit.description: Limit of maxinum connection load, default is unlimited

interval.description: Specify Query Interval, unit: second, default is 1

port.description: Specify local port to send probe packet, default is 0 (no port)

sleep.description: Specify Sleep Time when query fail, unit: second, default is 3

timeout.description: Specify Query Timeout, unit: msec, default is 3000

track.description: Specify Tracking Time, unit: second, default is 60
